creator: Net147@hotmail.com
text:
When installing a large metaport such as gnome2, portinstall may try to install a port that is already installed (or was previously installed as a dependency a related port). This can cause the port to be marked as failed and may cause other related ports that depend on it to be skipped.

Fix: 

A workaround for the moment is to repeat the portinstall until it installs successfully.
How-To-Repeat: portinstall gnome2
